labelConventions.note: identity_id / email / credential_id MUST NEVER be a metric label. Cardinality explosion + PII leak. Aggregate everything at the (method, outcome, reason) level. `device_name` is user-provided and treated as public in wire payloads but is still forbidden as a metric label — it would leak per-user activity to shared metric stores.

metrics.name: academorix.mfa.enrollment.previews_issued
metrics.description: Fired on MfaEnrollmentPreviewIssued. method=totp|webauthn (yes — WebAuthn enrolment also runs a preview round though the browser calls it 'options').

metrics.name: academorix.mfa.enrollment.previews_purged
metrics.description: PurgeUnconfirmedEnrollmentsJob output. Track the drop-off between enrolment previews and confirmations — high purge rate signals user friction OR bot-traffic hitting the endpoint.

metrics.name: academorix.mfa.enrollment.confirmed
metrics.description: Fired on MfaEnrollmentConfirmed.

metrics.name: academorix.mfa.enrollment.failed
metrics.description: Fired on MfaEnrollmentFailed. reason = confirmation_code_invalid | preview_expired | preview_missing | attestation_verification_failed | duplicate_credential.

metrics.name: academorix.mfa.enrollment.duration_ms
metrics.description: Wall-clock from MfaEnrollmentPreviewIssued to confirm (success) or expiry (failure). Signals user friction on the enrolment flow. Buckets tuned around the realistic 15s-2min range with wider extremes to capture outliers.

metrics.name: academorix.mfa.challenge.issued
metrics.description: Fired on MfaChallengeIssued.

metrics.name: academorix.mfa.challenge.succeeded
metrics.description: Fired on MfaChallengeSucceeded.

metrics.name: academorix.mfa.challenge.failed
metrics.description: Fired on MfaChallengeFailed. reason = code_mismatch | assertion_signature_invalid | sign_count_replay | recovery_code_invalid | expired | attempts_exhausted.

metrics.name: academorix.mfa.challenge.duration_ms
metrics.description: Wall-clock of the verification action. Constant-time by design: success and failure must fall in the same bucket range to prevent timing enumeration. Any drift signals a code path where success/failure has diverged and needs the drift-tolerance branch corrected.

metrics.name: academorix.mfa.recovery_codes.consumed
metrics.description: Fired on MfaRecoveryCodeConsumed.

metrics.name: academorix.mfa.recovery_codes.regenerated
metrics.description: Fired on MfaRecoveryCodesRegenerated. trigger = self_service | admin_action (support tooling).

metrics.name: academorix.mfa.recovery_codes.remaining_distribution
metrics.description: Distribution of remaining recovery-code counts across all Identities with MFA enrolled. Emitted every 60s. Left-tail bump = users at risk of MFA lockout; watch for the fleet-wide count of Identities with 0 remaining as an SLO.

metrics.name: academorix.mfa.recovery_codes.low_notifications_dispatched
metrics.description: source = per_consumption (from MfaBackupCodeCountLow) | nightly_sweep (from NotifyLowRecoveryCodesJob).

metrics.name: academorix.mfa.webauthn.credentials_registered
metrics.description: Fired on WebauthnCredentialRegistered. Track adoption breakdown across authenticator types. is_platform_authenticator = true|false. is_synced_passkey = true|false (backup_state).

metrics.name: academorix.mfa.webauthn.credentials_active
metrics.description: Count of webauthn_credentials rows where disabled_at IS NULL AND deleted_at IS NULL. Emitted every 5 minutes.

metrics.name: academorix.mfa.webauthn.credentials_disabled
metrics.description: Fired on WebauthnCredentialDisabled. reason = user_action | admin_force_disable | lost_device.

metrics.name: academorix.mfa.webauthn.credentials_deleted
metrics.description: Fired on WebauthnCredentialDeleted. trigger = user_action | retention_purge | admin_action | identity_erasure_cascade.

metrics.name: academorix.mfa.webauthn.retention_purged
metrics.description: CleanupDisabledWebauthnCredentialsJob output. Track the retention purge cadence.

metrics.name: academorix.mfa.webauthn.sign_count_replay_detected
metrics.description: Fired when the observer refused an updating operation because sign_count went backward. High-signal security event — indicates a cloned authenticator OR a replay attack in progress. Alertable at any non-zero value across a 24h window.

metrics.name: academorix.mfa.disabled
metrics.description: Fired on cumulative MfaDisabled. trigger = self_service | admin_action | account_recovery | identity_erasure.

metrics.name: academorix.mfa.suspicious_activity.signals
metrics.description: MfaSuspiciousActivityDetector output. disposition = notification_dispatched | debounced (within notification_debounce_hours) | subthreshold (signal below configured thresholds — but still counted for metric-level anomaly detection).

metrics.name: academorix.mfa.step_up.enforced
metrics.description: mfa.require_recent_challenge middleware evaluations. outcome = pass (recent challenge on record) | reject (too stale) | not_applicable (Identity has no MFA).

metrics.name: academorix.mfa.identities_with_mfa
metrics.description: Count of Identity rows where mfa_secret_encrypted IS NOT NULL OR at least one active WebauthnCredential exists. Emitted every 5 minutes. Drives the fleet-wide MFA-adoption dashboard.

metrics.name: academorix.mfa.identities_required_but_missing
metrics.description: Count of Identity rows where at least one referring User holds a role in `mfa.required_for_roles` BUT no MFA is enrolled AND grace_days_after_enrollment has elapsed. This is a policy-non-compliant count — action for the platform-security team.
